title: polypodium martensii
intro: Polypodium martensii, also known as He shou wu or Fo ti, is a type of Chinese herb belonging to the Polypodiaceae family, specifically a species of fern that is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-aging effects, as well as its ability to promote cardiovascular health and lower cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Polypodium martensii include improved cognitive function, enhanced immune system, and potential anti-cancer properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and traditional remedies. Herbal preparations of Polypodium martensii typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and leaves, which can be consumed as capsules, teas, or extracts to reap its medicinal benefits.
